generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder providing high‑resolution angular position of the motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxSecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox for axis angle measurement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor delivering the input current I_M of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance EncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder, GearboxSecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data (traces) 
instance OutputAngleTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live output angle trace of the robot axis derived from encoder measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, VisualizationDashboard, MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance MotorCurrentTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live motor current (I_M) trace streamed from the robot."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker, MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance DerivedTorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque trace calculated from motor current and angle data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine, VisualizationDashboard
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity trace computed from successive angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine, VisualizationDashboard
]

instance DerivedAccelerationTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration trace obtained from velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine, VisualizationDashboard
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLMotorGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing the motor, gearboxes and rotational flows of the vertical axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessDrivetrainModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the frictionless drivetrain."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the Stribeck friction characteristic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkDahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model representing the Dahl friction phenomenon."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the LuGre friction formulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool used to create and manage engineering models."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment for simulation and parameter identification."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService, SimulationMeasurementComparisonService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating live streaming of sensor data to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, DataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for model integration and metadata management."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelIntegrationService
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard providing real‑time visualization of measured and simulated data."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, SimulationMeasurementComparisonService, MotionControlAccuracyImprovementService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of live sensor traces and model outputs."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualInsightsForOperators
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automatic identification and estimation of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight, UpdateRobotControlAlgorithms
]

instance SimulationMeasurementComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated data against measured traces to assess model fidelity."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelVsMeasuredComparisonInsight
]

instance MotionControlAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Support for improving robot motion control accuracy using updated friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides RefineDigitalShadowModels
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Streaming of sensor data via MQTT to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualInsightsForOperators
]

instance ModelIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of engineering and simulation models into the digital twin via AAS."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance StructuralModelManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Management of SysML structural models within the digital twin environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualInsightsForOperators
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extracted friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) identified from live data."
]

instance VisualInsightsForOperators : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual insights presented to operators through the dashboard."
]

instance ModelVsMeasuredComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight highlighting discrepancies between simulated and measured data."
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateRobotControlAlgorithms : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feed extracted friction parameters back into robot control algorithms to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RefineDigitalShadowModels : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update digital twin models with newly identified parameters for continuous improvement."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is a passive one‑way representation; it does not send control commands back to the robot. No virtual‑to‑physical data flow is defined."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, online (real‑time) synchronization with the robot during operation, enabling on‑line friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow composed of a Purpose (FrictionDerivation), an Asset (the first axis of the MABI robot), Sources (sensor channels), Processing components (simulation models), Models (engineering, simulation, data‑calculation), and DataTraces/DataPoints, following the Digital Shadow Reference Model hierarchy."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is created and used during the operational/run‑time stage of the robot to understand and compensate friction effects."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Both white‑box analytical friction models and black‑box data‑driven models are employed; continuous identification compensates for wear, tool changes and temperature variations. Model validity is assessed by comparing simulated torque/velocity traces against measured references."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are streamed from the robot to the digital shadow over MQTT; models and metadata are exchanged using the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) framework."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation utilizes the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard and SysML modeling conventions."
]
